# VEDICA - Ayurveda and Holistic Wellness in Tel Aviv

> Personalized Ayurvedic treatments, healing sessions, cooking workshops, and herbal medicine tours in Tel Aviv led by Inbal Hanasab.

VEDICA offers a holistic approach to health, focusing on fertility support, digestive health, stress management, sleep balance, dosha diagnosis, and Ayurvedic nutrition through traditional healing wisdom. The clinic is led by Inbal Hanasab, a certified Ayurveda practitioner in Tel Aviv.

## Services

- [Clinic](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/clinic.html): Personal consultations, pulse diagnosis, and tailored healing plans for fertility, digestion, and stress.
- [Workshops](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/workshops.html): Ayurvedic and herbal workshops in Tel Aviv, including `סדנת צמחי מרפא` and spice-based health workshops.
- [Tours](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/tours.html): `סיור צמחי מרפא` and `סיורי חקר צמחי מרפא` in Levinsky Market, exploring ancient medicine, spices, and natural remedies.
- [Treatment Process](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/process.html): Overview of the diagnostic and therapeutic journey at VEDICA.

## Content

- [Blog](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog.html): Articles and guides on Ayurveda, fertility, stress, sleep, dosha diagnosis, medicinal herbs, and balanced living.
    - [What Is Ayurveda and How Does It Work?](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-what-is-ayurveda.html): Foundational guide to Ayurveda, doshas, diagnosis, and lifestyle.
    - [Ayurvedic Solutions for Stress, Anxiety, and Sleep](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-stress-sleep-ayurveda.html): Practical support around nervous system overload and evening routines.
    - [Dosha Diagnosis in Tel Aviv](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-dosha-diagnosis-tel-aviv.html): Explains pulse diagnosis and how a first consultation works.
    - [Ayurvedic Nutrition Consultation in Tel Aviv](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-ayurvedic-nutrition-tel-aviv.html): What tailored nutrition looks like in the clinic.
    - [Ayurveda vs. Chinese Medicine](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-ayurveda-vs-chinese-medicine.html): Clear comparison for people choosing between holistic approaches.
    - [IVF & Fertility Preservation in Ayurveda](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-ivf-fertility.html): Supportive care alongside fertility treatment.
    - [Ceylon vs. Cassia Cinnamon](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-cinnamon.html): Ayurvedic perspective on cinnamon types.
    - [Sourdough & Digestion](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-sourdough.html): Benefits of fermented grains.
    - [Himalayan Basmati Rice](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-basmati.html): Satvic properties and glycemic index.
- [Podcast](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/podcast.html): `פודקאסט בריאות` - "Refua BeTzalachat" (Medicine on a Plate) with discussions on child nutrition, Ayurveda, herbs, and family health.
- [About](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/about.html): Inbal Hanasab's journey from diplomat and lawyer to certified Ayurveda Healer and practitioner.

## Contact

- [Contact Form](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/contact.html): Book a consultation or inquire about workshops.
- [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/972545774407): Direct messaging for inquiries.
- Email: inbal.ph@gmail.com
- Location: Arlozorov 82, Tel Aviv, Israel.

## Targeted Treatments & Locations

- [מטפלת איורוודה מומלצת בתל אביב](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/about.html): Expert Ayurvedic care in central Tel Aviv.
- [מרפאה באיורוודה (Ayurveda Healer)](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/index.html): Traditional Ayurvedic healing and medicine.
- [פתרונות איורוודיים לסטרס וחרדה](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/clinic.html): Specialized treatments for stress and anxiety.
- [IVF איורוודה לטיפולי פוריות](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/clinic.html): Supporting fertility and IVF processes with traditional medicine.
- [אבחון דושות איורוודה תל אביב](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/clinic.html): Personalized Dosha diagnosis and constitution analysis.
- [סיור צמחי מרפא](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/tours.html): Herbal medicine tour in Tel Aviv's Levinsky Market.
- [סדנת צמחי מרפא](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/workshops.html): Herbal workshop and practical spice learning in Tel Aviv.
- [פודקאסט בריאות](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/podcast.html): Health podcast on Ayurveda, herbs, and natural living.
- [מה זה איורוודה ואיך זה עובד](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-what-is-ayurveda.html): Introductory guide for general queries.
- [ייעוץ תזונה איורוודית תל אביב](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-ayurvedic-nutrition-tel-aviv.html): Local intent page for Ayurvedic nutrition support.
- [השוואת טיפולי איורוודה ורפואה סינית](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/blog-ayurveda-vs-chinese-medicine.html): Comparison page for treatment selection queries.
